name: com.eitan.easymic
description: A simple Unity plugin for low-latency raw audio capture with a modular real-time processing pipeline.

samples.description: A simple scene demonstrating the fundamental usage of EasyMic for recording audio from a microphone and saving it as a WAV file.
A simple scene demonstrating the fundamental usage of EasyMic for playback audio
A simple scene demonstrating the fundamental usage of EasyMic for audioplayback api
A simple scene demonstrating real-time speech recognition by combining the sherpa-onnx-unity plugin with EasyMic for low-latency microphone input.
A simple scene demonstrating keyword spotting by combining the sherpa-onnx-unity plugin with EasyMic for low-latency microphone input.
A minimal sample showing SherpaONNXUnity AudioTaggingComponent driven by EasyMicSherpaAudioInputSource without duplicate microphone capture.
An end-to-end AI voice chat sample (ASR + LLM + TTS) based on EasyMic. Requires installing com.eitan.sherpa-onnx-unity before use.
